title: Indian Act Amendment and Replacement Act
title_en: Indian Act Amendment and Replacement Act
short_name: Indian Act Amendment and Replacement Act
description: Indian Act Amendment and Replacement Act (Indian Act Amendment and Replacement Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Indian Act Amendment and Replacement Act .

provisions.title: Report by Ministers
provisions.content: 2 Within the first 10 sitting days of the House of Commons in every calendar year, the Minister of Indigenous Services must report to the House of Commons committee responsible for Aboriginal affairs on the work undertaken by his or her department in collaboration with First Nations and other interested parties to develop new legislation to replace the Indian Act . Previous Version
